queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the relationship between having no checking account and reduced credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Investigation into the impact of checking account balances below zero on mitigating credit risk exposure.

queries.feature_definition: Credit amount requested by the applicant.
queries.question: Statistical determinants of creditworthiness: influence of requested credit amount on lowering default likelihood.
